record.title: "Aisanai Unmei" datta Hazu na no ni ~ Tokimodoshi Kihi no Futatome no Kekkon
record.description:
Christina married David, the young king of the powerful kingdom Romanova. But their marriage was cold; he was beautiful but silent, like an ice sculpture. Believing herself unloved due to her own inadequacies, Christina still loved him. When an assassin's blade threatened David, she shielded him with her own body and died. Yet she wakes up in the past, before their engagement. Granted a second life, Christina decides to live for her own happiness and avoids marrying David. But when they meet again, he is nothing like before—he pursues her with an intensity she never imagined. "I wanted to see you again."

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/350410/

record.title: "Tokutai" Sei ni Natta no de, Sei Waru Gyaeu o Shimei Shimasu! -Itsumo Tsukue ni Ketsu o Nosete Kuru umetsu-san-
record.description:
Get the grades and you get the gyaru. At least that's the idea behind the special honors program on Naoto Kageyama's campus: anyone who gets the top score on the term exam gets to pick someone that will "service" them as a reward for their exemplary performance. His only problem is that he has never scored higher than second place, but maybe his luck—and the gyaru that bullies him—will cum around.

[Official English](https://irodoricomics.com/Scoring-Gyaru)

record.title: "Zettai Ouja" to Yobareta Saikyou Dorei no Boukentan: Tokihanatareta Dorei wa, Jiyuu ni Sekai o Ouka Suru
record.description: Gil reigned as the strongest gladiator slave in the arena. Despite his dominance, he lived with a constant, unquenchable thirst for something more. One day, he finally seized a chance to escape. Having fled the city and gained his hard-won freedom, he heads for the neighboring kingdom of Bastel, where slavery does not exist. There, he begins a new life as an adventurer. However, for the world's strongest gladiator, the business of adventuring seems to be far too easy...?

record.title: 'Anata o Metoru Koto Wanai' to Tsumetaku Itte mo, Denka no Yasashisa Bare Bare desu yo? ~Ou Taishihi Kouho wa Mahou ga Tsukaenai Hakushaku Reijou~
record.description: https://www.cmoa.jp/title/335488/

record.title: (Jishou) Shinshina Yakuza wa Wakeari Ojou-sama o Amayakashitai
0 Temperature
record.description:
Min Kyung‑hee falls in love with a spirit called “Zero,” an entity that has followed her around ever since her first year of high school. As soon as she becomes an adult, she holds a “spirit wedding” with Zero and makes a plan: she will use a man in the real world as an empty shell, just a vessel, in order to give Zero a physical body. Things go smoothly at first as she puts in the effort to win over this “shell” man and her plan advances without a hitch. But one day, Kyung‑hee realizes what her own heart truly feels—and she comes to regret all of her choices. She has always chosen to run away rather than take responsibility. Will she avoid it all again this time too, or will she face the consequences of her love and her decisions?

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=850650), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14151563)

record.title: 1 Page Saki, Kimyou o Migi Houkou Desu. Katsumi Fuutarou Sakuhinshuu
record.description: https://comic-walker.com/detail/KC_008303_S

record.title: 1-nen Kagiri no Keiyakukon (Koushaku-sama no Dekiai-tsuki!): Eiyuu no Keibo ni Natta Watashi wa, Douyara Seijo no Matsuei no you desu
record.description:
Flora, a baron’s daughter, lost her parents at a young age and has been treated little better than a servant in her uncle’s household.

Just before turning eighteen, she is ordered into a political marriage with a count old enough to be her grandfather. Desperate to escape the engagement, Flora runs away from home.

However, during her escape, she becomes unexpectedly involved in a strange incident when an unknown woman entrusts her with a baby.

Then, after meeting a beautiful noble searching for the child, Flora’s fate begins to change dramatically—!?

_Source: [Fire CROSS](https://firecross.jp/ebook/series/609), translated_

record.title: 10,000 Ways to Eliminate Players
record.description:
The world I've transmigrated to is teeming with players, making survival difficult enough, but I'm further burdened by a system, becoming the most conspicuous NPC... The natives dislike me, and the players see me as a thorn in their side. Since I can't coexist peacefully with you all, then I'll—stop pretending, I'm laying my cards on the table! A wonderful life in this other world? Mine! Endless suffering? Yours! The sorrow is for the players, the rewards are for myself. The boss you can never defeat is me!

[Original Webtoon](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/657316)

record.title: 10-Saika no Kareshi wa High-spec Joushi
record.description:
Bullied at work and dumped by her boyfriend for being “suffocating,” Natsuko loses her confidence, gives up on her dream of being a web designer, and returns to her hometown. Keeping her distance from both “work” and “love,” she lets herself drift through a listless daily life—until one day, she stops in front of a job ad recruiting web designers. A young man she meets by chance there gently gives her a push. That young man turns out to be Ryo, the boy who used to live next door—now 10 years younger than her. Reunited, she discovers he is a university student and at the same time a cool‑headed, highly capable department head, someone even the company president respects. Yet in front of Natsuko, Ryo shows a straightforward, puppy‑like side befitting his age, clinging to her and desperately trying to win her over—an unexpectedly adorable contrast to his elite persona. As the confidence she lost to workplace bullying slowly returns under his devoted affection, Natsuko begins to move forward again— A restart office romance about an age‑gap couple.

[Original Webtoon](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/206591)

record.title: 100 Kai Ittara Tsukiatte? Buaisouna Rival Douki no Dekiai Zetsurin Sex
record.description:
An office worker, Mashiro, constantly loses to her talented but aloof coworker Kuroshiro, who is both admired and hard to read. One day, during a company drinking party, a personal secret about her is exposed by her ex, but Kuroshiro steps in to help. Afterward, as she takes care of him while he's drunk, an unexpected situation brings them closer together... Leading to a tense and complicates relationship with her rival coworker. (ArtLapsa)

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/345851/ 

[ebook Japan](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/948210/A006464976/)

record.title: 100 Oku de Rakusatsu Sareta Seijo wa Tekikoku Ooji no Hanayome ni Naru
record.description: Iris, the kingdom’s only saint, possesses the power to make plants grow. After her country loses a war, she is forced to marry into the neighboring nation. She accepts this fate of her own will in order to protect her people, but on the journey she is attacked by bandits and put up for auction. In the depths of despair, the one who purchases her for 10 billion is Victor, the neighboring country’s second prince, rumored to be cold and ruthless. Iris feels a deep gratitude toward him, yet Victor mistakenly believes she was sold off because she schemed to escape from him.

record.title: 100-kai Mawatte Ai wo Nake
record.description:
Iroha, a poor student on a scholarship, accidentally injures Kyogoku Matsuri, the school's biggest troublemaker!
Masuri, a hedonistic man, declares Iroha his dog as compensation and, for some reason, forces her to help with his rehabilitation!?

record.title: 2-Dome no Jinsei de wa Dogeza Sarete mo Yurushimasen
2-nen B-gumi Yuusha Destroyers
record.description: The Demon King who brought darkness to the world has been defeated by the hero, and the light has returned. But the Demon King leaves a part of himself behind as a successor known as Valaris III. To regain their reign of darkness, the new Demon King ventures out of the demon castle and heads to our world, but where they emerge is... From the creator of Gintama comes a devilish new comedy!

record.title: 2-Shuume no Youhei wa Shizuka ni Ikirahenai
record.description:
The "Grim Reaper" of the battlefield returns to his middle school days. Kurona Masamune, a mercenary who single-handedly turns the tide of battle on the East African battlefield, faithfully followed his father's teachings: "Don't have your own will, just follow orders." Living as the ultimate "tool," he loses his life due to betrayal during a mission. However, when he awakens, he finds himself in a middle school classroom 15 years in the past. "If I could do it over, I could do it better..." With this dying regret in his heart, the strongest former mercenary crushes evil within the school with "his own will" in this revenge action!

Source: [eBookJapan](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/986099/?type=serialStory), Translated

record.title: 3 Years Later, He Became My Boss
record.description: [Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27817)

record.title: 30,000 Miles to Find My Husband
record.description:
Young-ha, who has long dreamed of a spring-like love, is about to marry Seo-ju, whom she has been secretly in love with. She eagerly awaits her first night with Seo-ju, who has become her husband, but Seo-ju must leave for the north to defend her country. It is said that it will be at least five years before Seo-ju returns after the war. Unable to wait for Seo-ju indefinitely, Young-ha sets out for the north to meet her husband herself…

[Original Webtoon](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/finding_my_husband)

record.title: 5-fun no Ace
record.description:
Yuma, a first-year student, shows up for a trial session at his high school's struggling volleyball club. Surprisingly, his preferred position is the bench! Due to a heart condition, he can only exert himself at full power for exactly five minutes. Why did he join the club with such a heavy restriction? In front of the confused members, he unleashes extraordinary, top-tier plays during his brief window. It turns out Yuma was actually a legendary player during his middle school days! A boy who shines brighter than anyone else for a limited time shatters the common sense of sports

**Official Japanese**

[Manga Zegra](https://manga-zegra.com/series/27c5ff3df24ab?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQMMjU2MjgxMDQwNTU4AAGnl_SjEqS75ps463ns6xSNzY-XxYTqNcVdYlPSB_Q_wzA6bYNfYombpGgfgT4_aem_y7DuCCZyeXTyOq8U7t4u9Q)

record.title: 5-Ri no Otoko ni Korosare Sou na hodo Shuuchaku Sarete Imasu
record.description:
Lavinia is a villainous queen in a novel who is murdered by someone she trusts. When the reader wakes up as Lavinia, she knows there are five murder suspects: her seemingly loyal knight, her sly chancellor, her spy who was formerly an assassin, a brutal tribal king, and her brother, who's also her political rival. These men are all fixated on her, but when Lavinia changes her tyrannic ways, their obsession becomes less hostile and more friendly... even romantic, for some! Although her odds of survival are higher, Lavinia isn't sure she can juggle the affections of her dangerous suitors...

**Original Webtoon:**    
[LINE Manga](https://manga.line.me/product/periodic?id=S157885), [ebookJapan](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/943280/), [honto](https://honto.jp/ebook/pd-series_C-MBJ-21665-4-594524X.html), [Mecha Comic](https://mechacomic.jp/books/260299), [Cmoa](https://www.cmoa.jp/title/358087/)

record.title: 50 Ways to Leave a Psychopathic Villain
record.description:
The novel Evelyn Florence wakes up in has an 18+ rating for a totally different reason than one would expect. It is all because of the story’s psychopathic villain, Duke Cael Hartheon, who goes on to torture the female lead in unspeakable ways. But a bad drunken night results in Evelyn getting tied up with the literal worst character in the novel. Now forced into an impending marriage, Evelyn will do whatever she can to make Cael sick of her and leave her first. But if only the blood-red duke didn’t turn out to be such a green flag...!

**Original Novel:**    
[Chapters](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=12083624), [Volumes](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=13222459)

record.title: [Reariti Henkou-Shi] No Ryouchi Kaikaku ~Arayuru Mono Wo SSS-Rea Ni Kaeru Sukiru De, Misuterareta Tochi Wo Saikou Shimasu!~
record.description: Arc, the second son of a ducal house, was expected to inherit the prestigious [Sword Saint] class passed down through generations. However, he instead awakened a mysterious and seemingly useless class known as the [Rarity Changer]--a power of which effects were entirely unknown. Cast out to the remote and impoverished frontier of Japoli, Arc finds himself at a loss. Everything changes when he saves his childhood friend, Princess Lati, from danger. In that moment, his true ability finally awakens. As it turns out, the [Rarity Changer] is an extraordinary class that can maximize the value of anything, transforming it into SSS-rank quality! Crumbling fortress walls become impregnable defenses. Shoddy weapons are elevated into legendary armaments-- With this overwhelming power, Arc begins to rebuild the desolate land he was exiled to, turning it into an unstoppable stronghold that can even repel monsters. Once dismissed as worthless, the boy now reshapes the very meaning of value itself. An exhilarating fantasy of territorial restoration begins!

record.title: A 28-Year-Old Office Lady Becomes a Villain Prince
record.description:
At the end of a miserable day, office worker Oriha Amakawa was walking home, despairing of the world. Suddenly, lightning struck—and she found herself reincarnated in an unfamiliar world as an unfamiliar prince!?

In utter confusion, she gradually comes to understand the situation and discovers that her original owner, Oliver, was a notorious villainous prince with a ruthless and cruel personality, hated by everyone...!　

Desperate to clear her name, Oriha works tirelessly for the good of the world and its people. A new life begins for this hardworking office worker who has been reincarnated as the most hated person in the world!? An otherworldly revolutionary fantasy!

https://comic-boost.com/content/01730001

record.title: A Baby Cat Who Commands the Dog Clan
record.description:
A tiny kitten dropped into a family of fierce dog beastmen — a heartwarming struggle for survival and growth!

Hong Seol, a cat beastman abandoned by her parents for being unable to use inner power, meets a miserable end… only to…


**Original Webtoon:**   
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/69186189), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%A9%8D%EB%AC%B8%EC%84%B8%EA%B0%80%EB%A5%BC-%ED%98%B8%EB%A0%B9%ED%95%98%EB%8A%94-%EC%95%84%EA%B8%B0-%EA%B3%A0%EC%96%91%EC%9D%B4%EC%9E%85%EB%8B%88%EB%8B%A4/4847)

record.title: A Benevolent Curse and a Tasty Childhood Friend
record.description:
'Sex with a childhood friend... Is that possible for anyone?'

Ensign Lee Seol, an S-class hunter in South Korea, has one childhood friend.
Captain Yeo Woogyeong, an S-class hunter who is so outstanding he even received a special promotion.

"You should suck, Seol-ah."

But with this foxy bastard...
She's been caught by a terrible curse that will kill her if she doesn't 'shamelessly' (or 'sexually') stick with him!

[Kissing her childhood friend vs. Kissing her friend's 'balls']

When she was a naive twenty-year-old, after sleeping with Woogyeong while drunk, Seol had resolved never to make trouble again.
However, because of the sudden curse, Seol's resolve crumbles, and their relationship becomes even more complicated...

'Are we still friends, or not?'

[Original Webtoon](https://ridibooks.com/books/1746033656)

record.title: A Blessed Night
record.description:
Kim Eunchong is the definition of a devoted church boy - in fact, his name literally means “Blessing.” But one heartbroken, drunken night of regret shatters his pristine reputation. He wakes up with a massive hangover and a scandalous secret -  he slept with a man. Even worse, the mystery lover is one of his two best friends from church: Ju Hyeonu or Shin Ian. Eunchong prays that he can bury his mistake forever…but then a blackmail text featuring explicit photos of that sinful night hits his phone. One of his best friends has now turned into his biggest enemy, and returning to his peaceful life of faith is nothing but a pipe dream unless he can catch him. *(Source: Lezhin US)*

---

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/night_of_grace)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.lezhinus.com/en/comic/blessednight), [Spanish](https://www.lezhin.es/detail/una-noche-de-bendicion), [French](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/bt_1111330), [German](https://www.lezhinde.com/detail/dbd_00531), [Japanese](https://www.beltoon.jp/detail/blessed_night), [T.Chinese](https://www.bomtoon.tw/detail/nightofgrace), [Thai](https://www.lezhinth.com/detail/blessed_night)

record.title: A Crush Curse
record.description:
Jugyeong is a powerhouse Chief Producer who has never felt a single spark of true love. But her life shatters when a rogue celestial’s forbidden arrow strikes her by mistake. Consumed by a supernatural fever, she stumbles into the arms of Hyeonu. One look at him is all it takes for the curse to ignite, forcing a desperate confession to a total stranger. Now, Jugyeong must navigate a cutthroat industry and a vengeful executive director. In a world where a cold heart leads to a cold grave, can she turn a forced obsession into a love worth living for?

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=846662), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13633976)

record.title: A Delinquent Became My Apprentice
record.description:
Urara is an ordinary high school girl who loves cats and is loved by them. Today, seeking solace from cats, she visits her secret hideout where she can interact with many stray cats. 

There, she is approached by Izumi Hyuga, a delinquent covered in blood, who asks to be certified as a "kitty master" and become her apprentice...!?

record.title: A Despicable Marriage
record.description:
For fifteen years, Song Jingtang gambled her future on Huo Yunshen's unrequited love, only to become a vegetable on the day she gave birth to twins. Five years later, she awoke from her coma to Huo Yunshen's curse: "Never wake up again!" And her own children were calling his lover "Mom!" Her love burned away, Song Jingtang feigned blindness and weakness to storm back into the Huo family. She tore apart her beloved, kicked the unfaithful man, reclaimed everything, and was reborn!

[Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/26996/) 

**Official Translations:**    
[Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/195052)

record.title: A Diary of Love and Longing
A Disastrous Relationship
record.description:
A man who has never experienced the warmth of affection finds himself consumed by an obsession with a user named “Cocorose” in an anonymous group chat. To a man whose existence in a cramped gosiwon is already hanging by a thread, a single emoticon was enough to stroke his vanity, and a solitary delusion was enough to shatter his reality. The moment he misinterpreted an anonymous woman’s message as a sign of love, his bottom-tier youth began its descent into total catastrophe. Now, he is trapped in a collision between the woman from his daily life and the one from the digital shadows. It wasn’t truly love he was seeking, but a sense of salvation. This is the chronicle of a “trash-tier” romance, ignited by the desperate fantasies of a man with nothing left to lose.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=843473), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13236266)

record.title: A Dragon's Love
record.description:
On a stormy night, hardened mobster Cha San is limping home when he stumbles upon Shin Ro, a dragon bleeding out on the pavement. It’s love at first sight, pulling two entirely different worlds together in an instant. Fast forward to the present, and the unlikely couple is officially navigating newlyweds bliss. To support his beloved, Shin Ro hilariously adapts to human life by taking a job as a car salesman, while Cha San completely leaves his criminal syndicate behind to become a dedicated, apron-wearing stay-at-home husband. Relying entirely on each other, they dive headfirst into a chaotic, sweet, and incredibly steamy new chapter together.

---

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/newly_married)

record.title: A Gangster and a Wife?!
record.description:
Yun-Seul, whose life has been ruined by her involvement with a criminal organization.

She succeeds in kidnapping Seong Jae-Ha, the daughter of a successful boss.

The two engage in a war of nerves, treating each other like the lowest of the low, and after a physical struggle, Yun-seul subdues Jae-ha with a stun gun.

Yun-Seul succeeds in humiliating Jae-Ha by stripping her of her clothes under the pretext of a body search, but…

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/mafia_wife)

record.title: A Glimpse Into Jianghu
record.description:
Zhou Jinchen, who lost his eyes in the tragic massacre of his family, sets out on a path of revenge after taming a wolf to serve as his guide dog...

record.title: A Happy Ending After Divorce
record.description:
After three years of marriage, Shen Zhiyi finally realizes she has only ever been a stand‑in for the “white moonlight” in Gu Huaixu’s heart. Crushed by disappointment, she decides to divorce him. Only then does Gu Huaixu begin to recognize his true feelings for her and try to win her back—but time and again, he ends up hurting Zhiyi because of that same white moonlight.

[Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27706/)

record.title: A Hot Spring Trip With Friends
record.description:
*“You really think you can handle two people? Just stay still.”*

Yoon Juwon, a job seeker about to graduate from university, goes on a hot spring trip at the suggestion of his ten-year friends, the twin brothers Cha Chahyeon and Cha Chayoon.

But something about this trip feels strange. The pension they book by chance is unusually quiet, and instead of taking the baths like they are supposed to, the twins keep fixating on Juwon’s inverted nipples…

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/297086169), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000075724), [BookCube](https://www.bookcube.com/toon/detail.asp?webtoon_num=260041)

record.title: A Housewife's Deviation
record.description: [Original Webtoon](https://www.toomics.com/uplmscg/episode/toon/9270)

record.title: A Kiss to the Knight Who Swore Revenge
record.description:
“You came to offer your fate to me.” 

Fine is a girl who unjustly lost her two older brothers in the kingdom’s greatest scandal, the “Neltop Incident.” Disguising herself as a man, she becomes a knight and tries to take revenge on the corrupt royal family, but she falls into a trap and is driven into a corner. The one who saves her then is Victor, known as the “Wizard of Ruin.” 

Victor tells Fine, “I’ll grant you your revenge, but in exchange, give me everything you have.” 

What he asks of her is to infiltrate the “Room of Domination,” the secret space of the crown prince and princess, and retrieve the vow ring containing the contract between the royal family and Victor. Fine and Victor begin working together toward the same goal. Though they constantly clash at first, before long, they begin to soothe each other’s loneliness and find themselves drawn to one another… 

A fated romance fantasy woven from the flames of revenge and the light of pure love.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051297), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/revenge_kiss)

**Official Translations:**     
Japanese: [Cmoa](https://www.cmoa.jp/title/338185/)

record.title: A Lifelong Yearning for You
record.description:
Chae Do-young has admired Seo Ki-hyeon on TV ever since childhood. When they reunite in high school, Ki-hyeon turns out to hide a sharp, calculating nature behind his gentle smile. The person he truly loves is his childhood friend Kim Ga-on — and to win that love, Ki-hyeon uses Do-young as a pawn. Even as she is used and hurt again and again, Do-young cannot stop her feelings for Ki-hyeon.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=849508), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13975756)

record.title: A Lucky Day
record.description: [Original Webtoon](https://www.toomics.com/webtoon/episode/toon/9139)

record.title: A Marriage Which Starts From the Interview
record.description:
Oh Ga-eun goes to a job interview, hoping to finally escape unemployment. But… she sat in the wrong seat. 

“Ms. Yoon Hye-jin, right?” 

“I’m Oh Ga-eun…?” 

It wasn’t a company interview. It was an interview to become someone’s bride. The man in front of her is Joo Seok-jin, the president of Jushin Retail— a man who’s currently “recruiting” a wife. 

“Today’s interview to find my wife is a secret.” 

She promises to keep it confidential and leaves— only to run into him again at a vacation spot she spent all her savings to visit. Then a headline suddenly breaks: 

[Chairman Joo Seok-jin to Marry This September] 

“What do you think about becoming my bride, Ms. Oh Ga-eun?” 

“Fine. But don’t you dare cut my salary or allowances.” 

And just like that, their contract marriage begins. 

Position: Fake wife 
Job: Daughter-in-law of a chaebol family 
Additional duty: Surviving the in-laws.

 She was only supposed to act like the troublesome third daughter-in-law— so why does the way that man looks at her feel so sincere? A contract marriage that started with a mistaken interview seat. It began as something fake… but can their feelings stay fake too?

**Original Webtoon:**    
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/68752835), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EA%B2%B0%ED%98%BC%EC%9D%80-%EB%A9%B4%EC%A0%91%EB%B6%80%ED%84%B0/4795)

Housewife Seoyeon, exhausted by her husband's indifference, has fallen into an anonymous chat app. Awakens to the pleasures that had been lost. Han Ga-eun, a former bully who built a perfect family and a good wife and wise mother. One day, Seo Ji-hoon, the classmate she had most horribly tormented, appears as the man next door and begins a cruel revenge on her son, revealing his true face.

record.title: A Match with Me
record.description:
A confident high school fighter transfers to a new school expecting to dominate, but suffers a crushing defeat against a far stronger opponent. With his pride shattered, he becomes determined to win and decides to step onto the mat to prove himself.

record.description:
Yooju is forced to steal her twin sister's identity and enter a marriage of convenience. But Seunghan Do, the chaebol heir she's meant to deceive, sees through her charade from the very beginning. Instead of exposing her, he finds himself enthralled by her dangerous game.

record.title: A Night When Stars Fell
record.description:
On a rainy night, Yuseong wakes up alone among piles of garbage. With no memory of who he is or where he came from, he begins a new life working at Café Noah.

Though his days are peaceful, they are also precarious - until Kim Woohyun, the owner of a hardware store, appears. With a seemingly indifferent yet piercing gaze, he watches Yuseong’s every move, exuding an air of danger.

What Yuseong assumes is a fleeting encounter turns into something more when Woohyun saves him from an attack, and surprises him with unexpected words:

“Don’t we know each other? You don’t remember?”  
“Do you want to be friends?”

Yuseong, numb to his own wounds, and Woohyun, who persistently probes the trembling emotions beneath them, begin a connection. What will the two of them discover at the end of this night?

[Original Webtoon](https://ridibooks.com/books/4624000075)

record.title: A Note from Violet
record.description:
Violet Everdeen is known as the worst magician in the academy and she is an a illegitimate child from a noble family. Her home life and school life are awful. Suddenly, she gains the power to see visions of the future. The future seen, is a villainess, and an excution. Knowing this, she makes plans to avoid her death and the villainess label.

**Original Novel:**

record.title: A Peace-Loving Vampire Who Has Lived for Tens of Thousands of Years Has Somehow Become the Strongest in the World
record.description:
—No, no, aren't you mistaken?

Alto a vampire who had lived peacefully for about 2000 years, secluded in his own territory.

Then one day, an invitation arrived...

Lord Alto, the oldest vampire among the Four Heavenly Kings of the Demon Lord's Army;
Please participate in the Demon Lord's Army Executive Meeting.
Failure to participate will result in purging.

record.title: A Pervert Who Only Picks and Devours Other Perverts
record.description:
Who would have thought that a random porn video I stumbled upon would change me this much? Who would have guessed that I’m the kind of pervert who can’t be satisfied by my teacher, my brother-in-law, or even my dad’s friend? 

Every day, I’m drenched in pleasure, my body trembling, yet my heart remains utterly unfulfilled—my perverse desires… Will this person be able to satisfy them today?


[Original Novel](https://ridibooks.com/books/4287002218)    
[Original Webtoon](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/kinky_picking)

record.title: A Punk, Devoted to Pure Love
record.description:
Yujin, a straight-A student who dreamed of getting into medical school, had her entire rhythm thrown off by a brief romance in high school—and ended up blowing her college entrance exams. While retaking the year to try again, her delinquent ex-boyfriend Junha suddenly reappears in her life. Is he here to sabotage her exams once more… or is he still hung up on her? A sexy campus rom-com about two people who are impossibly different—and irresistibly drawn to each other.

**Original Webtoon:**     
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=847748), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13725734)

record.title: A Quiet Cat
record.description:
There are two types of people: those who choose and those who are chosen. Where there is a protagonist, there will be secondary characters, and protagonists inevitably interact with other protagonists. However, most people don't know which type they are.  "Do I seem like an easy target just because I'm quiet?"

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Toptoon](https://toptoon.com/comic/ep_list/a_quiet_cat)

**Official Translations:**    
[Japanese](https://www.toptoon.jp/product/130132)

record.title: A Retired Saint Will Raise Your Home Value
record.description:
I ended up transmigrating into the web novel *If You’ve Drawn Your Sword, You Might as Well Cut a Throat*, where the male lead, after endlessly regressing, loses his mind and sets the entire empire ablaze.

…And of all roles, I became one of the countless saintesses.

I have only one goal:

Get out before he goes insane and avoid the fiery ending!

But reality?

“Former Saintess Shuana. You are under arrest on charges of witchcraft and worshipping evil spirits.”

The moment I step outside the temple, some pseudo-religious bounty-hunting maniac starts chasing me, calling me a witch.

“You’re insane, right? Then die as much as you want. I’ll keep coming after you.”

The unhinged male lead obsessively hunts me down, even killing himself over and over just to regress and pursue me.

And to top it all off, I’ve been dragged into his endless regression loop.

…Will I be able to make it out of this novel alive?

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=847991), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13640149)

record.title: A Romance Beyond Boundaries
record.description:
It seems that the fiancée of Ian’s older brother—whose wedding is just around the corner—is having an affair with a coworker.

Determined to stop the marriage, Ian disguises herself as the secretary to the CEO of the company where her would-be sister-in-law works, planning to gather solid evidence within two months.

“Do you think boundaries exist just to be crossed?”

The man she ends up serving, CEO Cha Jeong-han, has a handsome face but a personality that leaves much to be desired. He constantly gets on Ian’s nerves.

“Yes. Boundaries exist to be crossed, actually.”

With no fear of getting fired, Ian decides to freely cross Jeong-han’s carefully drawn lines. And somehow, the once arrogant man who thought himself untouchable—

“Did you put on makeup today?”

“What?”

“It looks like you’re wearing lipstick.”

—suddenly starts acting differently.

“This won’t do.”

A thrilling romantic comedy with a dangerously escalating curve of emotions!

**Original Webtoon:**   
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/68302804), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EC%84%A0-%EB%84%98%EB%8A%94-%EB%A1%9C%EB%A7%A8%EC%8A%A4/4741)

**Official Translations:**     
[French](https://www.webtoons.com/fr/romance/a-romance-beyond-boundaries/list?title_no=10049), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/179800)

record.title: A Romance of Fidelity
record.description:
With perfect specs and face, Lee Seung-Woo
has lived a life loved by both men and women, yet he is an upright, chaste man who has never once "done" love. For him, love was something he could pursue whenever he set his mind to it. That was his belief until he met the impenetrable Baek Su-Rin.

“Noona, think objectively.”
“With this face, with this body… how often do you find a virgin who likes you?”
“Noona, there’s no one in my department as pure as me.”

Completely smitten with Su-Rin, Seung-Woo tries to emphasize his virginity...

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1716002952)

record.title: A Saint Opens a Nursery School With a Retired King in Another World in Her Thirties
record.description:
"An unwanted Saint? Fine then, I'll just make a place for myself!"

Kyoko, an around-thirty nursery school teacher, hit rock bottom after her engagement was broken off right before her wedding, forcing her to take a leave of absence from work. Even when she is summoned to another world as a Saint candidate, she is immediately dismissed as "useless."

──But she's determined to overcome this adversity using her childcare skills and her powers as a Saint! With the full cooperation of a fiercely-intimidating former king, she ends up opening a nursery school in this new world?! Surrounded by adorable children and a wonderfully clumsy man, her blissful new slow life begins!

record.title: A Senior Comforting His Junior
record.description:
**Note: This work contains sexually degrading/objectifying remarks and elements of coercive relationships.**

After being discharged from the military and returning to school, there was this cute junior. I thought it'd be incredibly hot if that guy, with his face all messed up from crying, would beg me to fuck him. So I decided to hypnotize and train him.

---

Just as Daehyun was about to frown, Semin snapped his fingers and said:  

"Choi Daehyun. What are you supposed to do at Semin hyung's place?"    
"Uh……."

Daehyun's eyes went completely vacant. A stupid smile hung on his lips. Daehyun spread his thighs apart with his hands and said:  

"Cock, ugh, I have to eat it, hyung, right?"   
"Hyung is feeding your lower mouth first because he's worried you might be hungry."

---

record.title: A Strange Day
record.description:
Doyoon moves to a quiet rural village, where he happens to find a white fox collapsed on the road. He brings it home and gives it the name Haru. That very night, Doyoon dreams of being with a mysterious white-haired man. Startled, he wakes up—only to find a small child sleeping soundly beside him…

“Could it be… you’re Haru?”  
“Hm?”

[A no-words-needed romance between a handsome, otherworldly top and a gentle, doting, warm-hearted bottom ♥]

---

[MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000073239)

record.title: A Villain Consumed by Desire
record.description:
When the reader wakes up as Levi, a sickly extra from a family of knights in a discontinued R-rated novel, she knows her days are numbered. To avoid being killed by the villainous Prince Damian during his future rebellion, Levi plans to avoid fighting him and live in the shadows. But fate takes a carnal turn when a lust demon attacks Damian. 

Although Levi successfully purifies the demonic energy inside him, it's only after their unplanned night of passion. Now, the ruthless prince who only desired the throne is dangerously obsessed with a woman he was never supposed to touch.

**Official Translations:**

record.title: A World Beyond the Surface: In My Second Life, My Phantom-Seeing Eyes Guide the Strongest Soldier
record.description:
Satsuki has spent her life feared and shunned because of her ability to see “phantoms”, grotesque beings invisible to others.

Even after being reincarnated as the eldest daughter of a prestigious family, she is branded useless for lacking magical power, and her engagement is broken off.

Reduced to living little better than a servant, her miserable days continue until she meets Ichii, a highly skilled elite military officer.

He sees value in the ability she has spent so long hiding, her power to see phantoms. And before she can even process what is happening, he half-forcibly tries to make her his assistant..

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/355992/

record.description:
The story revolves around Ye Chen, a billionaire who married into the family three years ago, only to be kicked out of his home after his wife's betrayal. After the divorce, his ex-wife and mother-in-law's attitudes undergo a dramatic change. His wife begs for another chance, while his mother-in-law is even willing to do housework and cook just to get him back home.

record.title: About Impure Obsession
record.description:
"Look only at me, where I can see you."      

"How would you like to attend a dinner as my partner, Ms. Yun Ha-ru?" 

They were just an ordinary employee and customer—at least, until she dropped her notebook at his house. 

"Honestly, I'm uncomfortable and find it difficult to be involved with you, Mr. Cho Jae-yun."    

"What should I do? I have no intention of letting you go."    

Ha-ru thought everything would end once she accepted his proposal and got her notebook back. But hearing his words, which sounded like he needed her, and feeling a warmth and consideration she had never received before, her fragile heart kept drifting toward him. Even though she knew she was nothing more or less than a partner to this man, it was like a swamp she could neither reject nor escape.    

"I like you."     

"I've come to like you, Director." Even so, she confessed to the man who said he didn't know or believe in love. "If only I could go back to before I liked you... I wouldn't be in this much pain." 

Without knowing that she would regret this day for a long, long time.

**Original Webtoon:**    
R19: [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051097)    
R15: [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051095)

record.title: About Our Child
record.description:
**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=848028), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13758005)  

In a 21st-century Korean Empire where absolute monarchy still exists, the royal family secretly hides the existence of a princess after the crown prince and his wife are murdered. Thirteen years later, an ordinary high school student, Hyunwoo, meets a transfer student named Doyoung who claims to be that hidden princess. As questions arise about her true identity, the truth behind the throne begins to unfold—entangling the imperial family, a resistance movement, and a concealed heir.

record.title: Absolutely No Applause
record.description:
Born into a powerful shamanic bloodline, a young man possesses spiritual abilities he desperately wishes to escape. He tries every possible method to avoid inheriting the fate awaiting him, yet restless spirits continue to haunt his life. When he encounters a terrifying evil entity and narrowly avoids disaster, he is unexpectedly rescued by a kind-hearted stranger whose mysterious guardian spirit effortlessly devours the threat. Realizing this man may hold the key to severing his own supernatural ties, he draws closer with hidden intentions only to find himself entangled in a dangerous mix of destiny, secrets, and growing attraction.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/never_shaman)

record.title: Academy no Ryuu Metsushi
record.description:
What is the most dangerous creature in the world?

Beasts with fangs that shatter steel and hearts burning with ferocious fire. They stand at the very top of the food chain as humanity's greatest predator.

—Dragons.

The war against them has lasted for 400 years. No one thought the grim tides of this battle could ever be reversed.

...That is, until he was let loose.

record.title: Academy Saikyou no Mob Healer
record.description: A famous game romance action RPG "Dungeon Academia". In that famous world of "game to the death," I reincarnated as a mob with the worst job possible: "Healer. " My fate was dying right away... However... I'll use my knowledge from grinding this game for days on end in my previous life to overturn that fate. A reincarnation fantasy, where healing is turned into a weapon to fashion a meteoric rise to the strongest in the world.

record.title: Accidental Romance
record.description:
Unpredictable! What will be the ending of this heart-pounding feeling?

When she gets a “hunch,” she’s right 100% of the time!

Boyoung, known as the “master of hunches,” is a couple manager who ranks first in matching success thanks to her almost supernatural sixth sense.

But, as the saying goes, “a monk can’t shave his own head.” Her own love life fails again and again. On top of that, because those hunches come to her anytime and anywhere, people often treat her like a strange person. That is why her first meeting with Eungi was, in short, a complete disaster.

A handsome face, but a personality that doesn’t match.

Eungi, famous as a divorce lawyer, does not believe in love, which he considers nothing more than an empty emotion, after witnessing the unhappy end of his parents’ marriage during his childhood.

Then, while handling a divorce case, Eungi is attacked by a stranger and loses his memory. When he sees Boyoung, who comes to visit him at the hospital, his heart begins to race like crazy.

When his memories suddenly return upon seeing her, Eungi starts looking for her every day, using his memory as an excuse. However, at the same time, he hurls cruel words at her, saying that “once he regains his memory, this heart-pounding feeling will disappear too”...

What will be the ending of this romance that began by chance?

**Original Webtoon:**     
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/68913399), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EC%96%B4%EC%A9%8C%EB%8B%A4-%EB%A7%88%EC%A3%BC%EC%B9%9C-%EB%A1%9C%EB%A7%A8%EC%8A%A4/4839)

**Official Translations:**    
[Japanese](https://www.amazon.co.jp/-/en/gp/product/B0DL66D2G7)

record.title: According to Their Own Instincts
record.description:
Kang Yu-Jin, an executive director at Shin-A Food, has lived by the belief that proving herself through numbers and skills is everything. 

To seize control of "Shin-A Food", her ultimate goal, she proposes a contract marriage to Ki Seung-Hyun, the president of SOO ENM. Ki Seung-Hyun, who lives while concealing his beastly nature, readily accepts her proposal to use him and cooperates by acting as a loving partner.

**Original Novel:**    
[Chapters](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=8119082), [Volumes](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=13230931) 

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=850889), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14158077)

record.title: Aching
record.description:
My first love, Joo Arin, whom I met again after five years. Why has she changed so much?

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=849736), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14024712)

record.title: Acting Husband's Brother-in-Law
record.description:
Dahlia had an ecstatic, once-in-a-lifetime experience on her wedding night. As she longed for that moment to happen again, her married life went on in a dull and painfully monotonous way, until she witnessed her husband’s infidelity. One night, while drunk, her husband slipped on the rooftop and died. At her husband’s funeral, Dahlia suddenly finds herself unjustly accused of murdering him. Then Sebastian, her husband’s identical twin brother, appears before her. Sebastian offers to help her avoid the royal guard’s infamous interrogation, on the condition that she bear his child. When she refuses, he reveals a shocking truth. “Dahlia, do you really believe the man who spent your wedding night with you was Calix?” The truth is, the one who shared that intoxicating wedding night with Dahlia was not her husband, but her brother-in-law.

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13758423), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/297088177), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/brotherinlawsproxy), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000076732), [BookCube](https://www.bookcube.com/toon/detail.asp?webtoon_num=260147), [Mootoon](https://www.mootoon.co.kr/comic/moo_list.mg?tcode=avgm), [Qtoon](https://www.qtoon.co.kr/toon/list.mg?tcode=6azo), [Toon365](https://www.toon365.com/domestic/domestic_detail.asp?toon_idx=49143), [ZzangComic](https://www.zzangcomic.co.kr/comic/detailview_comic.asp?comic_idx=52077), [Onestory](https://onestory.co.kr/detail/H049247365), [Nate](https://toonnbook.nate.com/detail/H049247365), [Aladin](https://www.aladin.co.kr/shop/wproduct.aspx?ItemId=388780826), [KyoboBook](https://ebook-product.kyobobook.co.kr/dig/epd/ebook/E000012653155), [Yes24](https://www.yes24.com/product/goods/183640135)

record.title: Addict (SUENOBU Keiko)
record.description:
The manga's story begins when a beautiful lady named Arisa becomes attracted to gambling due to her boyfriend. Before long, she is wrapped up in lies and debt, excusing her behavior and saying "I can stop anytime I want to." A couples counselor from America named Haruka Tsunagi will expose it all.

(Source: Anime News Network)

record.title: Adult Subscription Service
record.description:
Adult Subscription Service☆ Providing the best service with carefully selected men! Complete with various sexual preferences, role-plays, and costumes♥ Perfect care is provided! 100% customized service for customers! We fulfill all your fantasies. Even though she's an adult, Ari, who's been living a single life for 5 years without dating, spots a shocking advertisement. As if possessed, she fills out the survey and then tries to forget it. One day, an unfamiliar man knocks on Ari's studio apartment door. "You're so horny, you're about to pop. Giving it to any bastard like that, damn." A man perfectly suited for Ari's dangerous tastes, to whom she couldn't say no, appeared.

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/5285002244), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14087191), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/metatoon118), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/adult_subscription_service), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000078515)

record.title: Aelhelice
record.description:
The corporate drone dies and is reborn as a witch, only to be immediately ensnared by the white-haired vampire Alice, who binds her in a blood pact! In her loli form, she's clingy and adorable, the only one you can rely on. In her mature form, she's fierce and protective, her combat prowess maxed out. The bond forged through shared blood is sweet enough to make you dizzy. Yet dark currents already churn beneath the city's surface. Beneath the blood pact lies an unsolvable mystery—their meeting was never mere coincidence...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

Original Webtoon
[Original Webtoon](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc39433)
